title: Release Readiness
description: A small static feed showing the intended JSON-first Storyline contract.

cards.title: JSON contract drafted
cards.text: The renderer consumes a stable feed shape instead of spreadsheet-specific data.

cards.title: Symfony producer ready
cards.text: API Platform or a controller can emit this feed without changing the browser component.

cards.title: AssetMapper path
cards.text: The package can be imported from jsDelivr by Symfony importmap without a local Node build.
